narrations.assessor: Adam reviews Life — beneficiary claim for Robert
narrations.comms: Cara calls Robert with the final decision — claim APPROVED — with empathy and clear next steps — claim closed

preAssessor.narration: Theo personally oversees the bereavement claim for compassionate handling.

beats.narration: Robert prepares the bereavement paperwork after losing a family member.
Robert travels through the quiet suburb to the Zava Insurance Claims Office to lodge the claim.
Robert walks into the Zava Insurance building and is welcomed at reception.
Robert lodges the Life — beneficiary claim at the Zava Insurance reception.
Iris handles the lodgement with care and patience.
Theo personally oversees the bereavement claim for compassionate handling.
Iris routes the claim to the Claims Assessor.
Adam reviews the policy and required documents gently.
Adam confirms the policy is in force and beneficiary verified.
Adam hands the claim to Settlement.
Seth prepares the full benefit payment for the beneficiary.
Cara calls Robert with the final decision — claim APPROVED — with empathy and clear next steps for the beneficiary payment.
